description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular layout. The exterior features a mix of wood paneling and white plaster, with large glass windows and sliding doors that open onto a patio and pool area. The front entrance is accentuated by a small porch with steps leading up, flanked by landscaped greenery and a driveway. The backyard includes a swimming pool, a shaded seating area, and a large tree providing natural shade. The side of the house has a carport with visible parked vehicles and solar panels on the lawn. The overall design emphasizes open, airy spaces and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, wood and white exterior, large windows, and a poolside patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch, steps, driveway, and landscaped garden.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, solar panels, and the long wooden facade.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring the swimming pool, shaded seating area, and a large tree.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a windowed wall and more greenery, less architectural detail visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding doors
